title: The Static Crater
content: The world begins in a haze of acrid smoke and the smell of ozone. You are lying at the bottom of a shallow, glass-edged crater in the Borderlands. The red dust is swirling around you, but within the circle of the crater, everything is eerily still. A figure—{npc:kaelen}—is peering over the edge, their hand drifting toward a rusted iron knife. As they take in your {player.height}, {player.bodyType} frame and {player.eyeType} eyes, they [NPC_REACT]. 'I don't know what void you leaked out of,' the figure calls down, 'but you've sucked the life right out of the air. If you want a ride out of here, you're going to have to prove you aren't just a walking curse.'

choices.text: 'Who are you? And where am I?'
'Stay back. I'm not a curse, but I can be one if you touch that knife.'
(Ignore them and climb out of the crater yourself).

title: Borderlands Outpost
content: You arrive at a cluster of makeshift shacks built from salvaged plating and reinforced glass. This is the Borderlands Outpost, a haven for those who survive on the edge of the Static. The air is thick with the sound of grinding gears and the occasional crackle of energy.
